assertions.assertion: The web_app client has AllowOfflineAccess = true
assertions.rationale: The code explicitly sets AllowOfflineAccess = true on the web_app client.
The AllowedScopes includes "offline_access" in the updated client configuration.
AbsoluteRefreshTokenLifetime = 2592000 is explicitly set with a comment noting 30 days in seconds.
SlidingRefreshTokenLifetime = 86400 is explicitly set with a comment noting 1 day in seconds.
RefreshTokenExpiration = TokenExpiration.Sliding is explicitly set in the client configuration.
